text.title: micro-mvps Failure Modes
text.summary: Migrated antipatterns for micro-mvps as failure modes. Add detector + repair clauses where missing.

failure-mode.description: Running a micro-MVP for an assumption already validated by strong existing evidence.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Over-testing wastes time. Reserve micro-MVPs for genuinely uncertain assumptions; skip experiments where evidence already converges.

failure-mode.description: Skipping the pre-defined success threshold and interpreting results after the fact.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Post-hoc interpretation always finds a way to confirm the hypothesis. Pre-commitment is what makes the experiment honest.
